empwifi.title: Employee WiFi
empwifi.intro: Let staff connect this router to guest WiFi (hotel, conference, anywhere) from a simple page, without the admin password or advanced settings.
empwifi.no_password_desc: Allow anyone on this router's network to open the employee page without a password.
empwifi.no_password_warning: Warning: with no password, anyone connected to this router can open the employee page and change which network the router joins. Only use this on a network you trust.
empwifi.generated_hint: Give this to staff so they can open the employee WiFi page. Set your own below to replace it.
empwifi.password_keep: Leave blank to keep current password
empwifi.password_set_desc: A password is set. Enter a new one to change it.
empwifi.password_unset_desc: No password set yet. Set one so only staff can use the page.
empwifi.camouflage_desc: Hide this router behind a disguised MAC address when joining a network.
empwifi.banner_desc: Show a short message at the top of the employee page (up to 280 characters).
empwifi.banner_ph: e.g. Welcome. Ask the front desk if you need help.
empwifi.banner_scope_desc: Choose who sees the banner on the employee page.
empwifi.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
empwifi.err_need_password: Set a password, or enable "No password required".
